message:
🌱 Update kubectl-claude to v0.3.0

Adds audit_kubeconfig tool for checking cluster connectivity
and recommending kubeconfig cleanup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,27 +5,27 @@ class KubectlClaude < Formula
   desc "AI-powered multi-cluster Kubernetes management for Claude Code"
   homepage "https://github.com/kubestellar/kubectl-claude"
   license "Apache-2.0"
-  version "0.2.0"
+  version "0.3.0"
 
   on_macos do
     on_intel do
-      url "https://github.com/kubestellar/kubectl-claude/releases/download/v0.2.0/kubectl-claude_0.2.0_darwin_amd64.tar.gz"
-      sha256 "f553035d9df21c3cfdf0833e89cd80fd74876ccbfba6af0c28fc95beea53cd00"
+      url "https://github.com/kubestellar/kubectl-claude/releases/download/v0.3.0/kubectl-claude_0.3.0_darwin_amd64.tar.gz"
+      sha256 "f89727ec82a4b8e3338565fbed3909d9ba431104ce79d3b925f63d419aeee493"
     end
     on_arm do
-      url "https://github.com/kubestellar/kubectl-claude/releases/download/v0.2.0/kubectl-claude_0.2.0_darwin_arm64.tar.gz"
-      sha256 "0ef5be88023662c1fca2bd32ec565eb44b00c85a3aaf74552c0a7c8c30cec66e"
+      url "https://github.com/kubestellar/kubectl-claude/releases/download/v0.3.0/kubectl-claude_0.3.0_darwin_arm64.tar.gz"
+      sha256 "d03e48a253abe8413f7aa58c2c4303e06fb14f195a7f3b15e9e7d2d96111f216"
     end
   end
 
   on_linux do
     on_intel do
-      url "https://github.com/kubestellar/kubectl-claude/releases/download/v0.2.0/kubectl-claude_0.2.0_linux_amd64.tar.gz"
-      sha256 "1c1296150e00edc6ec3031d69d7fa29405324561432dae571cc9e10d19305fd7"
+      url "https://github.com/kubestellar/kubectl-claude/releases/download/v0.3.0/kubectl-claude_0.3.0_linux_amd64.tar.gz"
+      sha256 "0317905596ace7d50e33de79cdc78d504ecebbd35648d8ffa297a881aa46d288"
     end
     on_arm do
-      url "https://github.com/kubestellar/kubectl-claude/releases/download/v0.2.0/kubectl-claude_0.2.0_linux_arm64.tar.gz"
-      sha256 "ef64a8d92e6f6341bcf2df64367aa6be426bf78f7fec393f87917661931c37ab"
+      url "https://github.com/kubestellar/kubectl-claude/releases/download/v0.3.0/kubectl-claude_0.3.0_linux_arm64.tar.gz"
+      sha256 "b0083981106b5a21f2d2a925213e6fa54389bd629f477ec5c3c8558f158e0801"
     end
   end
